What we clean

Everything in your closet — handled with care.

From your everyday work shirts to the gown you'll keep forever, every piece is treated, pressed, and inspected before it comes back to you.

Dry Cleaning

Suits, dresses, blouses, ties and delicates — expertly cleaned, hand-pressed, and ready to wear. Most orders back in 1–2 days.

Wash & Fold Laundry

Drop the basket, we do the rest. Washed, dried, and neatly folded by the pound — perfect for busy weeks.

Alterations & Tailoring

Hems, zippers, take-ins and custom fits from an in-house tailor — your clothes, made to fit you right.

Wedding Gown Care

Professional cleaning & boxed preservation so the dress looks as perfect in 20 years as it did on the day.

Comforters & Household

Bulky comforters, blankets, drapes and table linens — cleaned fresh and folded crisp. Things your home washer can't handle.

Leather, Suede & Specialty

Leather, suede, uniforms and even flags — the tricky pieces other cleaners turn away. We treat them all with care.

On the line at Gene's

Your clothes, handled like ours.

Every piece rides the line — tagged, treated, cleaned, pressed, and bagged — then back to you good as new.

Three steps to clean clothes.

Skip the trip — or swing by the shop. Either way, you do almost nothing.

We clean & press

Each piece is inspected, treated for spots, cleaned, hand-finished, and protected — the way we've done it for 25+ years.

Fresh, back to you

We deliver it back to your door, or have it waiting on the rack — pressed, bagged, and ready to wear.

Two generations strong

Cleaning the metro's finest since day one.

Our story

Two generations of looking out for your wardrobe.

Gene's has been a true family shop from day one — right here in downtown Liberty, without ever losing the personal touch. We learn your name, remember your starch, and treat your clothes like they're our own.

For 25+ years, our neighbors have trusted us with everything from work shirts to wedding gowns. We'd be honored to earn your trust too.

By the numbers

Earned, one clean order at a time.

25+
Years family-owned
Free
Pickup & delivery
100%
Recommend us
🇺🇸 We even clean American flags. The tricky, sentimental, one-of-a-kind pieces? Those are exactly the ones we're proud to handle with care.
Good to know

Questions, answered.

Yes! Schedule a free pickup online and we'll come to your home or office, clean and press your order, and deliver it right back — you never have to leave the house.

Most standard orders are cleaned and ready in 1–2 business days. Need it sooner? Same-day service is available on items dropped before 9am.

Everyday dry cleaning and wash-and-fold laundry, plus suits, dresses, comforters, drapes, leather and suede, wedding gowns, uniforms, and specialty items like flags. If you're not sure, just ask — we've probably cleaned it before.

Right in downtown Liberty at 237 W Mill St — easy to find, with free pickup & delivery across the Kansas City metro. Open Mon–Fri 7–6 and Saturday mornings.

We accept all major cards, contactless pay, and cash in-store. Pickup & delivery orders are charged securely when your order is complete.
